task_description: Somia's first-ever agent task for any role -- no prior market_research/marketing has run yet. Draft one short-form video script for the character AIRI (somia/CHARACTER/AIRI.md: 'a girl who never shows anyone the feelings that spill over,' thought-leakage / unguarded inner self / digital solitude, quote: 'You're online right now... aren't you?'), following the exact structural rules in somia/VIDEO/VIDEO_FMT.md (0.0-0.8s extreme close-up, 0.8-2.0s slight zoom out, 2.0-6.0s minimal action, 6.0-10.0s one-line unresolved text, 10.0-12.0s silence/stillness; no interaction dependency, no explanation, maintain ambiguity, minimal deliberate motion) and somia/VIDEO/CONTENT_STRUCTURE.md's content units (character intro / mood fragment / unresolved text line / audio logo / short-form scene; keep the unresolved relationship visible in every piece). Output: a timed shot-by-shot script plus the exact one-line unresolved text for the 6.0-10.0s beat. This is a script/text draft only -- no image or video generation (those roles are separate and not yet built).
next_action: Review the handoff and, if approved, continue through the existing execution flow.
